objetivo: exemplo de shot-list para servico com prova visual
modelo: nano_banana_pro (Higgsfield MCP - generate_image, refs role=image, sem create_character)
anchor_personagem: Same service brand identity from the reference images: clean teal and white color system, rounded modern interface cards, friendly human-centered visual tone, crisp minimal composition. Modern service explainer style, vertical 9:16 frame.

cenas.prompt: Modern service explainer style, vertical 9:16 frame. Medium shot of a small business owner overwhelmed by messy notes and many browser tabs, teal and white ambient accents, clear visual stress, no readable text, no logo, clean composition.

Same service brand identity from the reference images: clean teal and white color system, rounded modern interface cards, friendly human-centered visual tone. Laptop screen showing abstract organized dashboard shapes without readable text, calm desk scene, vertical 9:16 frame.

Modern service explainer style, same teal and white brand identity from the reference images, before-and-after composition using abstract cards and clean visual blocks, no readable text, organized workflow feeling, vertical 9:16 frame.

Medium candid shot of a relaxed business owner checking a clean dashboard on laptop, same service brand identity from the reference images with teal and white accents, natural daylight, modern workspace, vertical 9:16 frame.

cenas.intencao: Fechamento limpo com espaco para CTA
cenas.prompt: Clean final service brand frame, abstract teal and white rounded interface cards floating over a bright minimal background, empty space at top and bottom for later text overlay, no text, no logo, no UI labels. Modern service explainer style, vertical 9:16 frame.

gate_consistencia.criterio: identidade teal/branco e estilo de interface reconheciveis em todas as cenas
gate_consistencia.regerar_cenas_falhas: 3/5 - regerar apenas as cenas falhas com prompt mais especifico e as mesmas referencias
gate_consistencia.pausar_para_revisao: menos de 3/5 - pausar, revisar anchor/referencias com o usuario e nao gastar mais credito no escuro
